headline: Generac's Jagdfeld Named to Manufacturers Association Board of Directors
summary: The National Association of Manufacturers announced that Aaron Jagdfeld, chairman, president and CEO of Generac, has been named to the NAM Board of Directors. Jagdfeld will join the NAM Board to bolster the association's leadership in policy advocacy, legal action, workforce solutions and operational excellence. He will help the industry advance a manufacturing competitiveness agenda that promotes opportunity and prosperity for all Americans.
